2.title: DB Time
2.query:
timeseries count = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.sql-oracle.queries.dbTime.count),
  by: { dt.entity.sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance }
| fieldsAdd sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

3.title: PL SQL exec time
3.query:
timeseries count = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.sql-oracle.queries.plSqlExec.count),

| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

| fieldsAdd sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance)
